'''yohazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zogged|zogged]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zogged|zogged]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yohazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohazithi|yohazithi]] || [[word:yohaziji|yohaziji]] || [[word:yohazishi|yohazishi]] || [[word:yohaziki|yohaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohazuthuthu|yohazuthuthu]] || [[word:yohazujuju|yohazujuju]] || [[word:yohazushushu|yohazushushu]] || [[word:yohazukuku|yohazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohazuthu|yohazuthu]] || [[word:yohazuju|yohazuju]] || [[word:yohazushu|yohazushu]] || [[word:yohazuku|yohazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohazufthuf|yohazufthuf]] || [[word:yohazufjuf|yohazufjuf]] || [[word:yohazufshuf|yohazufshuf]] || [[word:yohazufkuf|yohazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohazethe|yohazethe]] || [[word:yohazeje|yohazeje]] || [[word:yohazeshe|yohazeshe]] || [[word:yohazeke|yohazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohazothotho|yohazothotho]] || [[word:yohazojojo|yohazojojo]] || [[word:yohazoshosho|yohazoshosho]] || [[word:yohazokoko|yohazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohazotho|yohazotho]] || [[word:yohazojo|yohazojo]] || [[word:yohazosho|yohazosho]] || [[word:yohazoko|yohazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohazofthof|yohazofthof]] || [[word:yohazofjof|yohazofjof]] || [[word:yohazofshof|yohazofshof]] || [[word:yohazofkof|yohazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfthÃŸf|yohazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfjÃŸf|yohazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfshÃŸf|yohazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfkÃŸf|yohazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yohazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yohazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yohazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yohazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfthÃŸf|yohazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfjÃŸf|yohazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfshÃŸf|yohazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfkÃŸf|yohazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfthÃŸf|yohazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfjÃŸf|yohazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfshÃŸf|yohazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohazÃŸfkÃŸf|yohazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohazÃḊthÃḊ|yohazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yohazÃḊjÃḊ|yohazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yohazÃḊshÃḊ|yohazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yohazÃḊkÃḊ|yohazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohazathatha|yohazathatha]] || [[word:yohazajaja|yohazajaja]] || [[word:yohazashasha|yohazashasha]] || [[word:yohazakaka|yohazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohazatha|yohazatha]] || [[word:yohazaja|yohazaja]] || [[word:yohazasha|yohazasha]] || [[word:yohazaka|yohazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohazafthaf|yohazafthaf]] || [[word:yohazafjaf|yohazafjaf]] || [[word:yohazafshaf|yohazafshaf]] || [[word:yohazafkaf|yohazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yohazasha|yohazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yohazshÃḋsha|yohazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yohazrosha|yohazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yohazmusha|yohazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yohazyasha|yohazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyohaznkshÃḋsha|goyohaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyohaznkrosha|goyohaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyohaznkmusha|goyohaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyohaznkyasha|goyohaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yohahazasha|yohahazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yohahazshÃḋsha|yohahazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yohahazrosha|yohahazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yohahazmusha|yohahazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yohahazyasha|yohahazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyohahaznkshÃḋsha|goyohahaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyohahaznkrosha|goyohahaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyohahaznkmusha|goyohahaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyohahaznkyasha|goyohahaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yehÃḊzasha|yehÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yehÃḊzshÃḋsha|yehÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yehÃḊzrosha|yehÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yehÃḊzmusha|yehÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yehÃḊzyasha|yehÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyehÃḊznkshÃḋsha|goyehÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyehÃḊznkrosha|goyehÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyehÃḊznkmusha|goyehÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyehÃḊznkyasha|goyehÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yohfazasha|yohfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yohfazshÃḋsha|yohfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yohfazrosha|yohfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yohfazmusha|yohfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yohfazyasha|yohfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyohfaznkshÃḋsha|goyohfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyohfaznkrosha|goyohfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyohfaznkmusha|goyohfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyohfaznkyasha|goyohfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
